programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie gives the girls a break from the Miami heat in her new hometown, Los Angeles. Will Jen decide to stand by her man or send him to the showers? Can Royce and Gloria get over themselves? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn draws the line with Susie over unchecked gossip about a hot weekend in Vegas. Also, Shaunie's attempt to bring Kenny Anderson's ex, Tami, into the circle is met with skepticism. The episode ends with a shocking surprise. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Fallout over Suzie and Evelyn's argument has Suzie on the run to an unexpected source….GLORIA! Also, Tami reintroduces her daughters to father Kenny Anderson after many years apart. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie and the ladies launch a surprise ambush on Gloria to find out why her wedding was called off. Jen and Eric finally have "the talk" that will alter the course of their relationship forever. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: When Evelyn and Jen find themselves left off the guest list of a posh fundraiser thrown by circle outsider Ashley Walker, they decide to crash the event. Tempers flare when Tami and Jen get into it over an innocuous remark. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: Un grupo de cinco amigos de la universidad que están de vacaciones en una cabaña en la montaña cuando uno contrae un virus carnívoro. A medida que se propaga, sus verdaderos sentimientos emergen mientras luchan por sobrevivir.

programme.title: Encontré al Diablo
programme.desc: Un agente secreto jura venganza contra el psicópata Kyung-chul, que asesinó a su prometida. En su cacería sangrienta, el agente se obsesiona tanto que corre el riesgo de volverse tan monstruoso como su presa.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.sub-title: The Lighter Side Of Angela Matusa
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.desc: As Elaine nears a decision on her future, the cabbies reminisce about those glorious things that "might have been" had fate not sent them down that treacherous road to the Sunshine Cab Co.

programme.title: Blue Mountain State
programme.desc: Alors que le Coach Daniels se prépare à entrer dans le Hall des héros de l'université, Thad découvre des secrets troublants dans le passé de Daniels, tandis qu'Alex se lie à Marty à un nouveau niveau.

programme.title: Blue Mountain State
programme.desc: Le comportement de Thad s'aggrave après avoir subi une commotion cérébrale, ce qui rend difficile pour Daniels de cacher la blessure à Gilday et à la NCAA. Pendant ce temps, Sammy, coincé dans le sous-sol de la Goat House.

programme.title: Blue Mountain State
programme.desc: UNE SEMAINE, une série télévisée percutante est à BMS et suit l'équipe et ses coaches sur le terrain et en dehors. Tout en montrant la lutte pour retrouver la gloire passée, la série met en lumière le conflit croissant entre Gilday and Alex.

programme.title: Misfits: Saison 3: Nouvelle donne
programme.desc: En ses premiers jours de travaux d'intérêt général, le réveil est douloureux pour Rudy. Il doit apprendre à courir, à crier, et parfois... à tuer. Pour lui, c'est vraiment le cadet de ses soucis, le plus urgent étant de préserver son secret.

programme.title: Misfits: Saison 3: Dans la peau d'une autre
programme.desc: Lassé de la tournure que prend son existence et toujours interdit de compétition, Curtis décide d'utiliser son nouveau pouvoir pour concourir sous les traits d'une femme. Les choses se compliquent quand il tombe amoureux d'Emma, une des autres athlètes.

programme.title: Misfits: Saison 3: Destins animés
programme.desc: Toujours à la recherche de l'accomplissement de son destin en devenant SuperHoodie, Simon sauve Peter, un geek, accro aux bandes dessinées, d'une agression certaine. Peter est en admiration devant SuperHoodie.

programme.title: Misfits: Saison 3: Allo, Hitler ?
programme.desc: Un vieil homme juif envisage d'utiliser une partie des super-pouvoirs de Curtis pour remonter le temps et tuer Hitler. Mais son plan tourne mal et les Misfits se retrouvent dans un monde parallèle où la Grande-Bretagne est sous le joug nazi.

programme.desc: Alors qu'elle accomplit son travail d'intérêt général à l'hôpital, Kelly est emprisonnée dans le corps de Jen, une femme qui a sombré dans le coma. En possession du corps de Kelly, Jen s'échappe de l'hôpital en laissant la vraie Kelly dans le coma.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: Conexión de la Época Actual con la Antigüa
programme.desc: Kagome regresa a la actualidad. Ella está ocupada preparándose para un examen de prueba dos días después. Mientras tanto, Sango está preocupado por Kohaku, a quien Kagura se llevó.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: La Promesa Debajo del Arcoiris Lunar
programme.desc: Ayame, una mujer lobo demonio, aparece ante Koga y le dice que ella es su prometida. Pero Koga está locamente enamorada de Kagome. Él huye. Koga se detiene en el castillo de Naraku. Ayame va tras él y es atacado por un monstruo de pelo allí.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: La Novia de Kouga, el Lobo Veloz
programme.desc: Ayame trajo a Koga para detener la lucha de sus camaradas. Pero ella no tiene intención de regresar a Koga. El monstruo que estaba después de los fragmentos de la Joya Sagrada entonces ataca. Koga lucha para proteger a Kagome y Ayame.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Inuyasha y la pandilla se encuentran con una anciana que parece ser un purificador falso. Para descubrir por qué han aparecido tantos demonios recientemente, van al castillo principal de Ogre para luchar contra los ogros.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Inuyasha lucha contra el señor del castillo de Ogre. Sanfo oye que Miroku ha ido al sótano con la princesa y lo sigue con el viejo purificador. Kagome encuentra el cadáver de la princesa real en la habitación del señor.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Kikyo se encuentra con Kansuke, un viejo bandido. Kansuke está gravemente enfermo y está tratando de encontrar un lugar para morir. Hace cincuenta años, Onigumo lo convenció de que atacara a una sacerdotisa que protegía la Joya Sagrada.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: Los Tres Guardianes del Dios Mono
programme.desc: Inuyasha y la pandilla aceptan un trabajo para deshacerse de los monos, que están destruyendo campos. Se encuentran con tres monos, Gon, Bun y Ken. Los tres son espíritus de mono.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Kagome se resfría y vuelve a la actualidad. Inuyasha está preocupada por ella. Él recoge mucha comida nutritiva. Mientras lo hace, derrota a los demonios que se interponen en su camino.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: El hermano menor de Kagome, Sota, se ha enamorado. Se ha enamorado de Hitomi, uno de sus compañeros de clase. Al principio, le pide a Inuyasha un consejo varonil, pero al final, decide decirle que la ama con un plan orquestado por Kagome.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: Una Kirara Maligna y un Adivino Sospechoso
programme.desc: Tesso, un demonio del ratón que teme a los gatos, se transforma en un curandero y persigue a Kuroro, un Nekomata que lo está molestando. Inuyasha y su banda se encuentran con aldeanos que confunden a Kirara con Kuroro y tratan de ahuyentarla.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Kikyo fue devuelto a la vida por una de las técnicas secretas de Urasue. Ella conoce a Monju, que se encuentra en la misma situación. Monju no tiene suficientes almas de los muertos. Él recupera su vigor cuando se le dan las almas.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: En un pueblo determinado, Inuyasha y la pandilla están rodeados por aldeanos que no les gusta Miroku. Cuando preguntan por qué, dicen que Miroku ha estado haciendo muchas obras malvadas. Miroku sospecha que se trata de un impostor.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: El Creador de la Perla de Shikon - Parte 1
programme.desc: Inuyasha y la pandilla se encuentran con Izumo, quien está investigando el secreto de la creación de la Joya Sagrada. Escuchan que ha aparecido un demonio y van a investigar un pueblo cercano.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: El Creador de la Perla de Shikon - Parte 2
programme.desc: Kagome y los demás son secuestrados por demonios que usan falsas Joyas Sagradas. Inuyasha y el resto van a salvarlos, pero Gyu-Oh se interpone en su camino.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Aparecen los insectos venenosos de Naraku. Sesshomaru va tras ellos. Mientras tanto, Jaken es picado por un insecto venenoso y se está muriendo. Rin se queda con él. Ella intenta salvarlo. Se dirige al campo de Jinenji para obtener un fruto del Sennenso.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Kirara desaparece. Sango está preocupado. Shippo deduce las razones de Kirara para desaparecer. Él culpa a Inuyasha y los demás y los exhorta a que se arrepientan. En ese momento, un sonido atronador viene del bosque. Inuyasha y los demás se apresuran.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Kagome es atraída a una cueva por una voz que pide ayuda. Kagome entra en la cueva y conoce a Kikyo. Kikyo no tiene suficientes almas de los muertos y se ha debilitado.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: Kouga y Sesshoumaru, Un Enfrentamiento Peligroso
programme.desc: Ginta y Hakkaku pelean con Koga por algo pequeño y terminan trabajando por separado de él. Mientras lo hacen, se encuentran con el grupo de Sesshomaru.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: La Batalla en el Bosque de los Lamentos
programme.desc: Garamaru, un demonio polilla venenosa, ha atrapado a Kagome y los demás en un capullo. Kagome y los demás están sufriendo dentro de sus pesadillas. En la vida real, Inuyasha está luchando solo.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: La nieve está cayendo fuera de temporada. Miroku es secuestrada por Koyuki, una mujer misteriosa. Kagome y los demás escucharon a un cazador y su esposa sobre un demonio de la nieve. Cuando lo van a buscar, encuentran a Sango, que se había perdido.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: El Espíritu que Atacó al Clan Lobo
programme.desc: Un ogro gigante aparece en las montañas al norte. Su nombre es Kyokotsu. Kyokotsu come demonios cuando puede. Ataca a la tribu del lobo demonio. Koga ve a Imawa, un viejo lobo que resulta gravemente herido.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: La Banda de los Siete, un grupo de fantasmas, ha vuelto a la vida. El Calvario enviado para derrotarlos es diezmado por el segundo más fuerte de la Banda de los Siete, Jakotsu.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: El partido entre Jakotsu e Inuyasha se detiene cuando Mukotsu interfiere. Mukotsu secuestra a Kagome para hacerla su novia. Miroku y Sango intentan salvar a Kagome, pero el veneno de Mukotsu hace que no puedan moverse.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.sub-title: Un Guerrero con Armadura de Acero
programme.desc: Kagome, Miroku y Sango han sido debilitados por el veneno de Mukotsu. Inuyasha intenta alejar los ataques de ellos mientras lucha contra Ginkotsu de la Banda de los Siete.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: En el templo, Inuyasha verifica si Kagome y los demás están a salvo. Él termina confiando en Renkotsu. Ginkotsu lo bombardea. Inuyasha lo enfrenta, pero mientras lo hace, Renkotsu roba los fragmentos de la Joya Sagrada de Kagome y prende fuego al templo.

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Kagome, Miroku y Sango han dejado de respirar. Inuyasha busca la Banda de los Siete para vengarse. Conoce a Sesshomaru y se asegura de que es una ilusión. Pero Sesshomaru ha venido después de Kohaku y está cerca...

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Inuyasha y la pandilla se acercan a la luz de una Joya Sagrada que parece pertenecer a la Banda de los Siete, pero la luz no es corrupta. Suikotsu, un buen doctor posee el fragmento...

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: Inuyasha y la pandilla se acercan a la luz de una Joya Sagrada que parece pertenecer a la Banda de los Siete, pero la luz no es corrupta. Suikotsu, un buen doctor posee el fragmento...

programme.title: Inuyasha LT
programme.desc: La personalidad de la Banda de los Siete Suikotsu despierta y lucha contra Inuyasha. Cuando los niños le piden que se voltee, él tiene dolor de cabeza. Bankotsu decidió retirarse de la aldea.

programme.desc: Bankotsu consigue que Kagome y los demás participen en su batalla con Inuyasha. Inuyasha está enojado porque sus amigos se están lastimando y arrincona a Bankotsu.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.sub-title: OS Sentimentos de Sango, A Decisão de Mirok
programme.desc: A fim de derrotar os demônios, Sango reveste Hiraikotsu com veneno. Para purificá-lo do veneno, o Mestre das Poções diz que ela deve derrotar o demônio dentro do jarro.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Shishinki, o Ogre da Morte, aparece diante de Sesshomaru, dizendo a ele que Inuyasha e o pai de Sesshoumaru roubaram seu Meido Zangetsuha em uma batalha.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Sesshoumaru fica furioso quando descobre o segredo por trás do Tenseiga. Totosai tenta convencer Sesshoumaru de que ele irá superar seu pai uma vez que ele seja capaz de abandonar seu apego à espada, bem como seu ódio a Inuyasha.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Sesshomaru rouba o poder de Tetsusaiga com Tenseiga, fortalecido pela lembrança de Kanna, um fragmento do Mirror Demon. Inuyasha se transforma em sua forma demoníaca e tenta atacar, mas Sesshoumaru dispara seu Meido Zangetsuha.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: A sacerdotisa Hitomiko perdeu a vida nas mãos de Naraku. Mas ela volta à vida e tranca Kagome dentro de uma barreira. Então, o verdadeiro poder espiritual do arco do Monte Azusa se revela!

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Inuyasha e Kaede tentam descobrir o que está bloqueando os poderes de Kagome.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Kohaku permanece inconsciente depois de ser encarado por Magatsuhi, a vontade do mal. Kagome está preocupada, mas ela tem que se curvar e estudar para os exames de admissão, então ela decide voltar para casa.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Sesshoumaru persegue a má vontade, Magatsuhi. Mas é apenas parte de uma armadilha criada por Byakuya dos Sonhos. Magatsuhi encontra Kohaku inconsciente, e ele tenta entregar seu fragmento de Shikon para Naraku.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.sub-title: O Momento da Joia Ficar Completa
programme.desc: Naraku está atrás do último fragmento de Shikon e ele toma Kagome como refém.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Kagome se forma no ensino médio e retorna à era feudal. Shippo e Kohaku ficam na aldeia de Kaede, enquanto o resto da gangue se dirige para a batalha de Naraku.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: O coração de Inuyasha é devorado pelo veneno da Jóia de Shikon, e ele se transforma em sua forma demoníaca. Ele machuca Kagome e a escuridão em seu coração toma conta dele.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Os poderes espirituais de Kagome são restaurados e a luz divina é revivida na Jóia Shikon de Naraku. No entanto, Naraku usa isso como um chamariz para atrair Sango em sua armadilha.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Naraku tem vivido como um demônio apesar de ter um coração humano. Enquanto lutava contra ele, Kagome pergunta sobre seu verdadeiro desejo.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Naraku se dirige para o Poço do Comedor de Ossos e desaparece! Antes de desaparecer, Naraku faz seu último desejo para Kagome, ferido pelas mãos de Byakuya, ser engolido em Meido, o caminho para o submundo.

programme.title: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.desc: Quando a última pessoa a obter a Jóia Shikon faz o único desejo correto, a jóia será purificada e desaparecerá inteiramente deste mundo.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: A Garota que Volta no Tempo e o Garoto Lacrado
programme.desc: Anos após ser selado, Inuyasha, o meio-youkai é acordado por uma garota do ensino médio chamada Agome, que viajou no tempo atraves do poço Come-Ossos.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: As Pessoas Atrás da Joia de Quatro Almas
programme.desc: Concedido o poder de controlar Inuyasha, Agome descobre que ela pode ser a reencarnação da irmã mais velha de Kaede, Kikyo, que selou Inuyasha.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: A Volta Através do Poço Come-Ossos
programme.desc: Agome e Inuyasha precisam das habilidades do outro para reunir os fragmentos dispersos da Jóia de Quatro Almas, mas os dois não se dão bem.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: De volta ao presente, Agome está relaxando em casa quando Inuyasha vem procurá-la, e ela retorna com ele ao passado para encontrar Yura.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: O meio irmão de Inuyasha, Sesshomaru, aparece procurando pelo túmulo de seu pai que era um youkai-cachorro. Agome aprende sobre o passado de Inuyasha.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: Tessaiga, O Canino de Aço Destruidor
programme.desc: Apesar da ajuda de Agome em frustrá-lo, Sesshomaru descobre a localização do túmulo do pai de Inuyasha, que contém uma espada que ele deseja.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Agome é capaz de puxar a espada Tessaiga para fora do altar, e Sesshomaru tenta matá-la, irritando Inuyasha e provocando um duelo de irmãos.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: O Senhor Feudal Youkai, Sapo Tsukumo
programme.desc: Inuyasha e Agome encontram um jovem samurai chamado Nobunaga cujo senhor foi possuído por um youkai Sapo, e eles partiram para resgatar uma princesa.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.desc: Em sua jornada, Inuyasha e Agome encontram Shippo, um jovem youkai raposa que rouba um pedaço da Jóia para vingar seu pai assassinado.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: Confrontro Fantasma: Irmãos Relâmpago vs. Tessaiga

programme.desc: Quando Agome retorna ao presente, o poder da Jóia de Quatro Almas incita uma antiga máscara de noh para atacar seu avô.

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina doit rédiger un article sur la star Howard Dorough, mais quand Annie, la rédactrice en chef, publie un article sur l'arrogant personnage, il exige, sous menace de poursuites, que Sabrina fasse des excuses publiques lors de son prochain concert...

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Effrayée à l'idée d'interviewer une star du hip-hop qui a la réputation d'avoir mauvais caractère, Sabrina utilise ses pouvoirs. Pour son plus grand désespoir, le sort ne fonctionne pas, au contraire. Leurs personnalités sont échangées

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina prépare un scoop... Elle va révéler qu'une actrice célèbre est cleptomane après qu'elle l'ait surprise en plein vol à l'étalage dans un magasin. Elle met au point un plan pour prendre la diva les mains dans le sac.

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: Voyage dans le futur
programme.desc: Kenan et Kel se disent que leur série aura sans doute beaucoup vieilli dans quelques années, alors ils décident de faire un épisode se déroulant dans le futur.

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: Leçon de jonglage
programme.desc: Kenan se rend compte qu'il a trois rendez-vous différents à honorer le même soir. Il va faire tout son possible pour que personne ne le sache...

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: Crise d'identité
programme.desc: Kenan a l'impression qu'il a été adopté et se met en quête de la vérité.

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: La reprise des diplômes
programme.desc: Kenan est interdit de remise de diplômes après avoir rempli le bureau du Principal Horn de pudding. Pourra-t-il se faufiler dans la cérémonie sans être vu ?

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Quand Sabrina est filmée en train d'utiliser ses pouvoirs par une webcam, elle entre par magie dans l'ordinateur de Leonard pour effacer toutes les preuves compromettantes et rencontre les personnages de dessins animés Sammy et Scooby-Doo.

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Les filles visitent Miami pour Noël et ont une altercation avec la mère de Roxie.

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Roxie accuse Sabrina de ne pas lui faire confiance. Très fâchée et déçue, Sabrina se rend compte que la seule manière de récupérer son amie est de lui révéler qu'elle est une sorcière. Parallèlement, Salem utilise l'élixir de vérité sur Morgan.

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina tombe accidentellement au pays des merveilles, où elle rencontre le lapin blanc et la reine de cœur.

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.sub-title: La perfection est-elle de ce monde ?
programme.desc: Sabrina lance un sort pour éliminer tous ses défauts afin de se rendre parfaite.

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: Viva Hollywood (1ère partie)
programme.desc: Kel gagne un voyage au festival Orange Soda. Mais après s'être trompés d'avion, Kenan et lui se retrouvent à Hollywood. Ils décident de visiter la ville.

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: Solidarité avec Chris
programme.desc: Le frère de Chris vient à Chicago et décide de prendre contrôle de sa vie. La famille de Kenan va essayer de lui faire quitter la ville afin que Chris ne vive plus chez eux.

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: Poisson d'Avril
programme.desc: C'est le 1er Avril et Kenan et Kel s'apprêtent à piéger de nombreuses personnes. Mais l'histoire tourne mal lorsque tout le monde est arrêté à cause de ces mauvaises blagues.

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Après que la chambre de Sabrina se soit transformée en chapiteau de cirque, elle doit marcher de haut en bas sur la corde raide jusqu'à ce qu'elle trouve un équilibre dans la vie entre son petit ami, ses amis et son travail.

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Après avoir sauvé Morgan d'une chute mortelle, Sabrina doit affronter la colère de trois déesses.

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Lorsque des querelles éclatent lors du dîner de Sabrina avec ses futurs beaux-parents, elle jette un sort d'harmonie et tout le monde éclate en chanson.

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Lorsque tante Irma découvre que Sabrina épouse un mortel, elle transforme Aaron en poisson.

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: Kenan et Kel : Le best of
programme.sub-title: Kenan et Kel : Le best of
programme.desc: Kenan et Kel sont amis depuis fort longtemps. Ils en profitent pour passer en revue les plus beaux moments de complicité qu'ils ont vécu ensemble...

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch: Sabrina, l'apprentie sorcière

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch: Opération vérité

programme.desc: Les aventures sentimentales et magiques de Sabrina, une jeune sorcière en apprentissage...

programme.desc: Salem met au défi Sabrina d'utiliser sa magie pour réaliser trois bonnes actions avant la fin de la journée. Cependant ses tantes l'avertissent que toute action sur les humains peut avoir de terribles conséquences pour tous...

programme.title: Sabrina The Teenage Witch: Dream Date

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: Vive Hemingway

programme.title: Kenan et Kel: Kel le magnifique

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephen Port
programme.desc: A chilling look at the crimes of Stephen Port, the east London serial killer who poisoned four young men with lethal doses of a date rape drug.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Shipman
programme.desc: Doctor Harold Shipman was convicted of killing 15 patients in 2000, but he is thought to have killed up to 215. Discover how he was eventually caught by detectives.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Russell Murders
programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a 'model' nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, why did she murder four children and attempt to kill 11 others?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Jill Dando
programme.desc: Documentary examining the unsolved murder of British TV presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot outside her house in Fulham, London, in 1999.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Dunblane Massacre
programme.desc: In an emotional tribute, witnesses and victims' relatives look back on the tragic murder of 16 children and a teacher at Dunblane Primary School in Scotland, 15 years ago.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jeremy Bamber
programme.desc: An investigation into Jeremy Bamber's brutal murder of his family in Essex, which occurred in 1985. Sentenced for life, he still maintains he is innocent. Is the right person behind bars?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Rhys Jones
programme.desc: The parents of innocent 11-year-old Rhys Jones, shot on his way home from a football club in Liverpool 2007, speak about the harrowing day when they lost their son.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Stephen Cameron
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the fatal stabbing of 21-year-old motorist Stephen Cameron during a motorway altercation in 1996.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Garry Newlove
programme.desc: Garry Newlove’s wife Helen talks about the events on the night of his murder and the days afterwards, as well as her current work as a peer in the House of Lords combatting anti-social behaviour.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Garry Newlove
programme.desc: Garry Newlove’s wife Helen talks about the events on the night of his murder and the days afterwards, as well as her current work as a peer in the House of Lords combatting anti-social behaviour.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Christopher Foster
programme.desc: Failed businessman Christopher Foster killed his wife and daughter before burning their mansion in Shropshire to the ground in August 2008.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Christopher Foster
programme.desc: Failed businessman Christopher Foster killed his wife and daughter before burning their mansion in Shropshire to the ground in August 2008.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Marchioness Disaster
programme.desc: The story of the Marchioness; a pleasure boat that collided with dredger Bowbelle and sank within minutes resulting in the loss of 51 lives.
